seo.description: Need a Neural Frames alternative for lyric videos? Start with lyrics-first AI visuals that keep words readable, synced, and ready to export.

hero.badge: Neural Frames alternative — AI lyric video maker, free
hero.subhead: Neural Frames generates AI visuals from music, but lyrics often get lost in the process. LyricVideoMaker is built for lyric videos: upload your song, AI transcribes and syncs the lyrics, generates mood-driven visuals, and keeps the words readable. Export free, no subscription needed.

comparisonTable.title: Neural Frames vs LyricVideoMaker for Lyric Videos
comparisonTable.description: Both tools can create AI-powered music visuals. The difference is whether readable, beat-synced lyrics are the center of the result.

rows.label: Main focus
values: Readable lyric videos with AI-generated visuals supporting the words
AI music visuals and generative video direction

rows.label: Lyrics

comparisonTable.note: For lyric content, the words must remain the product. LyricVideoMaker keeps AI visuals in service of the lyric layer.

howItWorks.title: How This Neural Frames Alternative Makes Lyric Videos

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. The project begins with lyrics and timing, so AI visuals support the words instead of taking over the whole screen.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically and syncs every line to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. AI generates visuals that match the song's mood while keeping lyrics readable.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full lyric video before publishing. Confirm lyrics are accurate and readable, then export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. Free to export, no subscription required.

whyChoose.title: Why Make AI Lyric Videos on LyricVideoMaker
whyChoose.description: AI visual generators are exciting, but lyric videos need one non-negotiable thing: the words must stay readable and synced. LyricVideoMaker generates mood-driven visuals while keeping the lyrics front and center.

highlight.title: AI visuals + readable lyrics, not one or the other
highlight.description: Neural Frames gives you visuals. LyricVideoMaker gives you visuals AND lyrics — transcribed, synced, readable, and exportable. You don't have to choose.

cards.title: Words remain the hero
cards.description: Generated visuals support the lyric layer instead of competing with it, so fans can actually read the line they came for.

cards.title: Visual mood follows the track
cards.description: The look still responds to the song's mood and energy, but it is shaped around lyric readability rather than pure visual spectacle.

cards.title: Useful for lyric channels
cards.description: A repeatable lyric-first workflow helps channels and artists publish visual songs without losing the core text layer.

items.question: Is LyricVideoMaker free as a Neural Frames alternative?
items.answer: Yes. LyricVideoMaker is free as a Neural Frames alternative — free credits to start and export, no subscription or card.

items.question: How is LyricVideoMaker different from Neural Frames?
items.answer: Neural Frames is strongest when the main goal is generative music visuals. LyricVideoMaker is built for lyric videos: it auto-transcribes lyrics, syncs to the beat, generates matching visuals, and keeps lyrics readable on screen.

items.question: Do I need to type lyrics like in Neural Frames?
items.answer: No. AI transcribes every lyric line from your audio in 50+ languages and keeps them readable on screen. Edit any line if needed.

items.question: Can I get AI visuals AND readable lyrics?
items.answer: Yes. LyricVideoMaker generates mood-driven visuals while keeping lyrics synced and readable. You don't have to choose between pretty visuals and readable words.

items.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes. The lyric videos you export are fully yours — monetized channels and commercial releases included. Just make sure you have the rights to the track.

items.question: How hard is it to switch from Neural Frames?
items.answer: There's nothing to migrate. Upload the same song you used in Neural Frames and you'll have a finished lyric video in a couple of minutes — no project files to move, no setup.
